# kSecPaddingOAEPKey

**Global Variable**

PKCS7 padding will be used when encrypting or decrypting.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecPaddingOAEPKey: CFString
```

## Discussion

When using this padding type, consider also setting the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecOAEPMessageLengthAttributeName], [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecOAEPEncodingParametersAttributeName], and [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecOAEPMGF1DigestAlgorithmAttributeName] attributes.
title: kSecPaddingOAEPKey
